calendar.matters:
LAW AND MOTION
Off Calendar Mar-18-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Albert Garcia, Esq. 510-812-4497 for Petitioner Dr. Benjamin Wilbur who is also present.
Wendy Widlus, Esq. Deputy Attorney General 213-269-6457 CA Attorney General for Respondent.
Court reporter: Tamara Willat, CSR #4609, 415-272-1753, Tamarawillat@sbcglobal.net (In-person)

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. Mr. Garcia contests and presents arguments. The Court comments. Ms. Widlus submits to the TR and responds to Plaintiff's arguments. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Petitioner Benjamin Stuart Wilbur, MD's petition for writ of administrative mandate is Taken Under Submission.

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: Tamara Willat, CSR #4609, 415-272-1753, Tamarawillat@sbcglobal.net, Reported. (302/JMQ)

LAW AND MOTION
Off Calendar Mar-03-2026 Continued To Mar-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER BENJAMIN WILBUR Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate.

Continued to March 17, 2026. Petitioner to lodge a copy of the administrative record with department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date.

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMT)

Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate
Off Calendar Feb-20-2026 Continued To Mar-03-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER BENJAMIN WILBUR Notice Of Hearing On Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandate.

Continued to March 3, 2026, on the court's motion.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
